title: tricliceras longepedunculatum var. eratense
intro: Tricliceras longepedunculatum var. eratense, also known as the Eratense Tricliceras, is a plant species within the family Phyllanthaceae, which is native to certain regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Tricliceras longepedunculatum var. eratense include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to apply the medicinal properties to the skin.
